_note: The identification zone (containing mandatory fields) is positioned in the lower-right corner of the trimmed drawing area. Maximum width 180 mm regardless of sheet size; height varies (100-297 mm per ISO 5457 §4).

identification_zone.mandatory_field_arrangement: Mandatory fields stacked vertically within the identification zone; identification_number in lower-right corner; title_subtitle above; issuing_organization above title; approval_date in date field

adjacent_zones.description: Optional fields may occupy zones above or to the left of the identification zone, within the title block region per ISO 5457
adjacent_zones.common_layout: Revision history table above identification zone; scale/sheet-number/paper-size in a strip immediately above identification zone

engine_lookup._purpose: Flat key/value form for runtime engine consumption — identification zone dimensions by sheet size
